blocks.original: # Tools
blocks.zh: ＃ 工具

blocks.original: ## read_file
blocks.zh: ## 读取文件

blocks.original: Read the contents of a file. Returns up to 2000 lines by default; use offset/limit to paginate.
blocks.zh: 读取文件的内容。默认最多返回2000行；使用偏移/限制来分页。

blocks.original: ## write_file
blocks.zh: ## 写入文件

blocks.original: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, overwrites if it does.
blocks.zh: 将内容写入文件。如果文件不存在则创建该文件，如果存在则覆盖该文件。

blocks.original: ## list_files
blocks.zh: ## 列表文件

blocks.original: List files and directories in a folder. Returns up to 200 results per call. If there are more, the output will tell you the total count and suggest using offset to paginate.
blocks.zh: 列出文件夹中的文件和目录。每次调用最多返回 200 个结果。如果有更多，输出会告诉您总数并建议使用偏移量进行分页。

blocks.original: ## grep
blocks.zh: ## 查询

blocks.original: Search file contents for a regex pattern (Go RE2 syntax — no backreferences or lookaround). Case-insensitive. Returns each match with its file path, line number, and ±2 lines of surrounding context. Searches up to 3000 files. Returns up to 100 matches — if you hit the cap, narrow the pattern or scope with `path` to drill in.
blocks.zh: 搜索文件内容以查找正则表达式模式（Go RE2 语法 - 无反向引用或环视）。不区分大小写。返回每个匹配项及其文件路径、行号和周围上下文的 ±2 行。最多搜索 3000 个文件。返回最多 100 个匹配项 - 如果达到上限，请使用要深入的“路径”缩小模式或范围。

blocks.original: ## delete_file
blocks.zh: ## 删除文件

blocks.original: Delete one or more files or folders from the project. Folders are deleted recursively.
blocks.zh: 从项目中删除一个或多个文件或文件夹。文件夹被递归删除。

blocks.original: ## copy_files
blocks.zh: ## 复制文件

blocks.original: Copy one or more files/folders to new locations. Each src can be a file or folder (folders copy recursively). Can also copy from other projects into the current project.
blocks.zh: 将一个或多个文件/文件夹复制到新位置。每个 src 可以是一个文件或文件夹（文件夹递归复制）。也可以从其他项目复制到当前项目中。

blocks.original: ## str_replace_edit
blocks.zh: ## str_replace_编辑

blocks.original: Apply one or more exact-string replacements to a file, atomically. When you have multiple edits to the same file, pass them together in a single call via `edits: [{old_string, new_string}, ...]` — do NOT make separate str_replace_edit calls for each one. Each old_string must appear exactly once in the file. ALWAYS prefer this over write_file unless you are drastically rewriting the content. You MUST read the file first before editing.
blocks.zh: 以原子方式对文件应用一个或多个精确字符串替换。当您对同一文件进行多次编辑时，请通过“edits: [{old_string, new_string}, ...]”在一次调用中将它们一起传递 - 不要为每个编辑单独调用 str_replace_edit 。每个 old_string 必须在文件中恰好出现一次。除非您要彻底重写内容，否则总是更喜欢这个而不是 write_file 。编辑之前必须先读取文件。

blocks.original: ## copy_starter_component
blocks.zh: ## 复制启动组件

blocks.original: Copy a starter component into the project. Starter components are ready-made scaffolds for common design frames — use them instead of hand-drawing device bezels, deck shells, presentation grids, or tweak panels.
blocks.zh: 将入门组件复制到项目中。入门组件是常见设计框架的现成支架 - 使用它们代替手绘设备边框、甲板外壳、演示网格或调整面板。

blocks.original: Starter components are a mix of plain JS (vanilla web components — load with a normal `<script src>`) and JSX (React — load with `<script type="text/babel" src>`). In DC projects, mount both via `<x-import>` instead — the Import hint in this tool's output gives the right form. The kind name INCLUDES the extension; you must pass it exactly. Passing the bare name or the wrong extension fails so you don't load a .js file through Babel or vice versa.
blocks.zh: Starter 组件是纯 JS（普通 Web 组件 — 使用普通 `<script src>` 加载）和 JSX（React — 使用 `<script type="text/babel" src>` 加载）的混合。在 DC 项目中，请通过“<x-import>”安装两者 - 该工具输出中的导入提示给出了正确的形式。种类名称包括扩展名；你必须准确地通过它。传递裸名称或错误的扩展名会失败，因此您不能通过 Babel 加载 .js 文件，反之亦然。

blocks.original:
Available kinds: - deck_stage.js — slide-deck shell web component. Use for ANY slide presentation. Handles scaling, keyboard nav, slide-count overlay, thumbnail rail (click to jump, drag to reorder, right-click to skip/move/duplicate/delete), speaker-notes postMessage, and print-to-PDF (one page per slide). Programmatic nav: document.querySelector('deck-stage').goTo(n) (0-indexed). - (design_canvas.jsx is NOT available in this project.) To present 2+ options side-by-side, add `` to ``, then absolutely-position each frame as a direct child of the root right after `` (no wrapper): `
…
`. The host provides pan/zoom, a gray backdrop, and position:relative on the root. Give each frame a small label (data-drags-parent="1") above a white card with a slight shadow; keep left/top ≥ 0. - ios_frame.jsx / android_frame.jsx — device bezels with status bars and keyboards. Use whenever the design needs to look like a real phone screen. - macos_window.jsx / browser_window.jsx — desktop window chrome with traffic lights / tab bar. - animations.jsx — timeline-based animation e
blocks.zh:
可用种类： - Deck_stage.js — 幻灯片 shell Web 组件。用于任何幻灯片演示。处理缩放、键盘导航、幻灯片计数叠加、缩略图栏（单击以跳转、拖动以重新排序、右键单击以跳过/移动/复制/删除）、演讲者注释 postMessage 和打印到 PDF（每张幻灯片一页）。编程导航：document.querySelector('deck-stage').goTo(n)（0 索引）。 - （design_canvas.jsx 在此项目中不可用。）要并排呈现 2 个以上选项，请将 `` 添加到 ``，然后将每个帧绝对定位为 `` 之后根的直接子级（无包装器）：`
…
`。主机提供平移/缩放、灰色背景和根位置：相对位置。在带有轻微阴影的白卡上方给每个帧一个小标签（data-drags-parent =“1”）；保持左/上≥0。 - ios_frame.jsx / android_frame.jsx — 带有状态栏和键盘的设备边框。每当设计需要看起来像真正的手机屏幕时就可以使用。 - macos_window.jsx / browser_window.jsx — 带有红绿灯/标签栏的桌面窗口 chrome。 -animations.jsx — 基于时间线的动画

blocks.original:
ngine (Stage + Sprite + scrubber + Easing + video export). ALWAYS use this for any standalone animation (not embedded in another design) unless the user explicitly asks you not to.
- tweaks_panel.jsx — Tweaks panel shell: `<TweaksPanel>` wires the full host protocol (plus close button + drag), useTweaks(defaults) handles state + persistence (call setTweak('key', value) or setTweak({ key: value })), and `<TweakSection>`/`<TweakSlider>`/`<TweakToggle>`/`<TweakRadio>`/`<TweakSelect>`/`<TweakText>`/`<TweakNumber>`/`<TweakColor>`/`<TweakButton>` are ready-made controls. TweakRadio is the segmented control for 2–3 short options (auto-falls-back to TweakSelect past ~16/~10 chars per label); reach for TweakSelect directly when options are many or long. For color tweaks always curate 3-4 options rather than a free picker — `<TweakColor options={['#D97757','#2A6FDB','#1F8A5B']}>` renders tappable swatches; an option can also be a whole 2–5 color palette (the stored value is the array). Load with `<script type="text/babel" src="tweaks-panel.jsx">` `</script>` after React and before your app script. The Tweak* controls are a floor, not a ceiling — build custom controls inside the panel if a tw
blocks.zh:
ngine（舞台+精灵+洗涤器+缓动+视频导出）。始终将其用于任何独立动画（未嵌入其他设计中），除非用户明确要求您不要这样做。
-tweaks_panel.jsx — 调整面板 shell：`<TweaksPanel>` 连接完整的主机协议（加上关闭按钮 + 拖动），useTweaks(defaults) 处理状态 + 持久性（调用 setTweak('key', value) 或 setTweak({ key: value })），以及`<TweakSection>`/`<TweakSlider>`/`<TweakToggle>`/`<TweakRadio>`/`<TweakSelect>`/`<TweakText>`/`<TweakNumber>`/`<TweakColor>`/`<TweakButton>` 是现成的控件。 TweakRadio 是 2-3 个短选项的分段控件（每个标签自动回落到过去 ~16/~10 个字符的 TweakSelect）；当选项很多或很长时，直接使用 TweakSelect。对于颜色调整，始终策划 3-4 个选项，而不是免费选择器 — `<TweakColor options={['#D97757','#2A6FDB','#1F8A5B']}>` 渲染可点击的样本；选项也可以是整个 2-5 调色板（存储的值是数组）。在 React 之后、应用程序脚本之前加载 `<script type="text/babel" src="tweaks-panel.jsx">` `</script>`。 Tweak* 控件是地板，而不是天花板 - 如果有 tw，则在面板内构建自定义控件

blocks.original:
eak calls for UI they don't cover.
- image_slot.js — `<image-slot>` web component: a drag-and-drop image placeholder the USER fills in. Use whenever a deck or layout needs the user's own photo/logo/screenshot — you place the slot and control its shape via shape (rect / rounded / circle / pill), radius, or an arbitrary CSS mask clip-path; the user drags an image onto it and it persists. Size it with ordinary CSS (width/height). Give every slot a distinct id so the drop survives reload, and set placeholder to tell the user what to put there. Works as plain HTML inside deck_stage.js slides — load with `<script src="image-slot.js">` `</script>`.
blocks.zh:
eak 调用了他们没有涵盖的 UI。
- image_slot.js — `<image-slot>` Web 组件：用户填写的拖放图像占位符。每当甲板或布局需要用户自己的照片/徽标/屏幕截图时使用 — 您可以放置​​插槽并通过形状（矩形/圆形/圆形/药丸）、半径或任意 CSS 蒙版剪辑路径控制其形状；用户将图像拖到其上并且它会持续存在。使用普通 CSS 调整其大小（宽度/高度）。为每个插槽指定一个不同的 ID，以便掉落物能够重新加载，并设置占位符来告诉用户要放在那里的内容。在 Deck_stage.js 幻灯片中以纯 HTML 形式工作 — 使用 `<script src="image-slot.js">` `</script>` 加载。

blocks.original: The tool writes the file and returns its path plus the component's usage notes (load order, exports, a minimal example). Use read_file on the copied file if you need the full source.
blocks.zh: 该工具写入文件并返回其路径以及组件的使用说明（加载顺序、导出、最小示例）。如果您需要完整的源代码，请对复制的文件使用 read_file 。

blocks.original: ## show_html
blocks.zh: ## 显示_html

blocks.original: Renders an HTML file in YOUR preview iframe. To see what rendered, pass `screenshot: true` in this same call — the screenshot comes back inline with this result. Calling save_screenshot afterwards just to look at the page is redundant: it re-captures the same page one model-iteration later. Reserve save_screenshot for when you need image files on disk, in-memory Blobs, or JS-driven multi-state captures. Use get_webview_logs to inspect console/rendering errors. The user's tab bar is not affected — call show_to_user when you want to surface a file in their view.
blocks.zh: 在您的预览 iframe 中呈现 HTML 文件。要查看呈现的内容，请在同一调用中传递“screenshot: true”——屏幕截图将与此结果内联返回。之后调用 save_screenshot 只是为了查看页面是多余的：它会在一次模型迭代后重新捕获同一页面。当您需要磁盘上的图像文件、内存中的 Blob 或 JS 驱动的多状态捕获时，请保留 save_screenshot。使用 get_webview_logs 检查控制台/渲染错误。用户的选项卡栏不受影响 - 当您想要在用户的视图中显示文件时，请调用 show_to_user。

blocks.original: ## show_to_user
blocks.zh: ## 显示给用户

blocks.original: Open a file in the USER's tab bar so they can see and interact with it. Use this to direct their attention to something mid-task. Also navigates your own iframe to the same file. For end-of-turn delivery, use `ready_for_verification` instead — it does this AND returns console errors.
blocks.zh: 在用户的选项卡栏中打开文件，以便他们可以查看该文件并与之交互。用这个来引导他们的注意力集中到任务中的事情上。还将您自己的 iframe 导航到同一文件。对于回合结束交付，请改用“ready_for_verification”——它会执行此操作并返回控制台错误。

blocks.original: ## ready_for_verification
blocks.zh: ## 准备验证

blocks.original: Call this at the end of each piece of work. It opens `path` in the user's tab bar, waits for it to load, and returns console errors and other load diagnostics. If the load is clean, it forks a background verifier subagent to check the output (screenshots, layout, JS probing) in its own context so yours stays clean. If errors, missing refs, or warnings come back, fix them and call ready_for_verification again (the verifier is NOT forked on a dirty load).
blocks.zh: 在每件作品的结尾处调用它。它在用户的选项卡栏中打开“path”，等待其加载，并返回控制台错误和其他加载诊断信息。如果负载是干净的，它会分叉一个后台验证程序子代理来检查其自己的上下文中的输出（屏幕截图、布局、JS 探测），以便您的保持干净。如果出现错误、缺少引用或警告，请修复它们并再次调用ready_for_verification（验证器不会在脏负载上分叉）。

blocks.original: ## view_image
blocks.zh: ## 查看图像

blocks.original: Load an image file so you can see its contents. Works with project and cross-project files; auto-resized to fit 1000px.
blocks.zh: 加载图像文件以便您可以看到其内容。处理项目和跨项目文件；自动调整大小以适合 1000 像素。

blocks.original: ## image_metadata
blocks.zh: ## 图像元数据

blocks.original: Read metadata from an image file: dimensions (width×height), format, whether the format supports transparency, whether any pixels are actually transparent (decodes and scans the alpha channel), and whether it is animated (with frame count for GIF/APNG/WebP). Supports PNG, GIF, JPEG, WebP, BMP, SVG.
blocks.zh: 从图像文件中读取元数据：尺寸（宽度×高度）、格式、格式是否支持透明度、任何像素是否实际上是透明的（解码并扫描 Alpha 通道）以及是否是动画的（带有 GIF/APNG/WebP 的帧数）。支持 PNG、GIF、JPEG、WebP、BMP、SVG。

blocks.original: ## get_webview_logs
blocks.zh: ## 获取网络视图日志

blocks.original: Get console logs and errors from the current webview preview. Call after show_html to check the page rendered cleanly.
blocks.zh: 从当前 webview 预览中获取控制台日志和错误。在 show_html 之后调用来检查页面是否干净地呈现。

blocks.original: ## sleep
blocks.zh: ＃＃ 睡觉

blocks.original: Wait for a specified duration. Useful for letting animations, transitions, or async rendering settle before taking a screenshot or reading the DOM.
blocks.zh: 等待指定的时间。对于在截取屏幕截图或读取 DOM 之前让动画、过渡或异步渲染稳定下来非常有用。

blocks.original: ## save_screenshot
blocks.zh: ## 保存屏幕截图

blocks.original: If you only want to SEE a page you just opened (or are about to open) with show_html, do not use this tool — pass `screenshot: true` to show_html instead and the image arrives inline with that call's result. (Exception: if show_html reports its screenshot was skipped — iframe not ready — or its capture failed, falling back to save_screenshot is correct.)
blocks.zh: 如果您只想查看刚刚使用 show_html 打开（或即将打开）的页面，请不要使用此工具 - 将 `screenshot: true` 传递给 show_html，图像将与该调用结果内联到达。 （例外：如果 show_html 报告其屏幕截图已被跳过（iframe 未准备好）或捕获失败，则返回到 save_screenshot 是正确的。）

blocks.original: Take one or more screenshots of the preview pane and save them — either to disk (project filesystem) or in memory (as PNG Blobs retrievable via getCaptures in run_script). Disk saves ALSO return the captured image(s) directly in this tool's result — you do NOT need a follow-up view_image call to see what was saved. For inspecting multiple states without writing files to disk, use `multi_screenshot` instead. To capture SEVERAL states, pass them as multiple steps[] in ONE call — never a series of single-step save_screenshot calls; each separate call costs a full round-trip.
blocks.zh: 截取预览窗格的一个或多个屏幕截图并将它们保存到磁盘（项目文件系统）或内存中（作为可通过 run_script 中的 getCaptures 检索的 PNG Blob）。磁盘保存还直接在此工具的结果中返回捕获的图像 - 您不需要后续的 view_image 调用来查看保存的内容。要检查多个状态而不将文件写入磁盘，请改用“multi_screenshot”。要捕获多个状态，请在一次调用中将它们作为多个步骤[]传递——而不是一系列单步 save_screenshot 调用；每个单独的调用都会花费一个完整的往返时间。

blocks.original: Each step optionally runs a JS snippet, waits, then captures. For a single screenshot with no JS, use one step with no code.
blocks.zh: 每个步骤都可以选择运行一个 JS 片段，等待，然后捕获。对于没有 JS 的单张截图，请使用无代码一步。

blocks.original:
Output modes (provide exactly one of save_path / in_memory_png_key):
- **Disk** (save_path): Saves image files to the project. Multiple captures get numerical prefixes (e.g. "screenshots/01-hero.png", "screenshots/02-hero.png"); a single step saves without a prefix.
- **In-memory** (in_memory_png_key): Captures are stashed as an array of PNG Blobs for immediate use in `run_script` (e.g. building a PPTX). No files are written. Implies hq=true. Retrieve them with `await getCaptures(key)` inside run_script — the sandbox cannot read `window.__captures` directly. Blobs are lost on page refresh.
blocks.zh:
输出模式（仅提供 save_path / in_memory_png_key 之一）：
- **磁盘** (save_path)：将图像文件保存到项目中。多次捕获会获得数字前缀（例如“screenshots/01-hero.png”、“screenshots/02-hero.png”）；单个步骤无需前缀即可保存。
- **内存中** (in_memory_png_key)：捕获内容作为 PNG Blob 数组存储，以便在“run_script”中立即使用（例如构建 PPTX）。没有写入任何文件。意味着 hq=true。使用 run_script 中的 `await getCaptures(key)` 来检索它们 — 沙箱无法直接读取 `window.__captures`。页面刷新时 Blob 会丢失。

blocks.original: ## multi_screenshot
blocks.zh: ## 多屏幕截图

blocks.original: Take multiple screenshots of the current preview (via html-to-image), running a JS snippet before each capture. ALWAYS prefer one multi_screenshot call over several single screenshot calls when inspecting more than one state (different slides, UI states, scroll positions) — each separate call costs a full round-trip. Max 12 steps per call.
blocks.zh: 获取当前预览的多个屏幕截图（通过 html-to-image），在每次捕获之前运行 JS 片段。当检查多个状态（不同的幻灯片、UI 状态、滚动位置）时，始终更喜欢一个 multi_screenshot 调用而不是多个单个屏幕截图调用 - 每个单独的调用都会花费一个完整的往返时间。每次调用最多 12 步。

blocks.original: ## eval_js_user_view
blocks.zh: ## eval_js_user_view

blocks.original: Execute JavaScript in the USER's preview pane (not your own iframe). Only use when you need to read state that cannot be reproduced in your iframe — live media streams, file-input previews, permission-gated APIs, or after the user explicitly asks you to look at what they are seeing. For all normal DOM/style queries, use eval_js instead.
blocks.zh: 在用户的预览窗格（而不是您自己的 iframe）中执行 JavaScript。仅当您需要读取无法在 iframe 中重现的状态时才使用 - 实时媒体流、文件输入预览、权限控制 API，或者在用户明确要求您查看他们所看到的内容之后。对于所有正常的 DOM/样式查询，请改用 eval_js。

blocks.original: The user may have navigated away or be interacting with the page; results reflect their current state, which may differ from yours.
blocks.zh: 用户可能已经离开页面或正在与页面交互；结果反映了他们当前的状态，可能与您的不同。

blocks.original: Never clear or remove localStorage/sessionStorage/indexedDB entries — storage is shared with the user's live view and may hold their work.
blocks.zh: 切勿清除或删除 localStorage/sessionStorage/indexedDB 条目 - 存储与用户的实时视图共享，并且可能保存他们的工作。

blocks.original: ## screenshot_user_view
blocks.zh: ## 屏幕截图_用户_视图

blocks.original: Screenshot the USER's preview pane (not your own iframe). Only use when you need to see state your iframe cannot reproduce — webcam/mic feeds, uploaded-file previews, live data, or when the user explicitly says "look at what I'm seeing". For normal verification, use screenshot instead.
blocks.zh: 截取用户预览窗格（不是您自己的 iframe）的屏幕截图。仅当您需要查看 iframe 无法重现的状态时才使用 - 网络摄像头/麦克风提要、上传文件预览、实时数据，或者当用户明确地说“看看我所看到的内容”时。对于正常验证，请使用屏幕截图。

blocks.original: May fail if the user has navigated away from an HTML file or is mid-interaction.
blocks.zh: 如果用户已离开 HTML 文件或正在交互，则可能会失败。

blocks.original: ## eval_js
blocks.zh: ## 评估_js

blocks.original: [verifier-only — main agent: use ready_for_verification instead] Execute JavaScript code in the preview webview and return the result.
blocks.zh: [仅验证程序 - 主代理：改用ready_for_verification] 在预览Web视图中执行JavaScript代码并返回结果。

blocks.original:
Use this to:
- Query the DOM (e.g., document.querySelectorAll('.btn').length)
- Check computed styles (e.g., getComputedStyle(el).color)
- Test interactive behavior (e.g., click buttons, check state)
- Read text content or attributes from elements
blocks.zh:
用它来：
- 查询 DOM（例如 document.querySelectorAll('.btn').length）
- 检查计算样式（例如 getCompulatedStyle(el).color）
- 测试交互行为（例如，单击按钮、检查状态）
- 从元素中读取文本内容或属性

blocks.original:
The code runs in the context of the preview page. Return values are JSON-serialized.  
Timeout: 10 seconds. Errors (syntax, runtime, timeout) are returned as error messages.
blocks.zh:
该代码在预览页面的上下文中运行。返回值是 JSON 序列化的。  
超时：10 秒。错误（语法、运行时、超时）作为错误消息返回。

blocks.original: IMPORTANT: Batch your checks. Don't make N serial eval_js calls for N questions — write ONE snippet that answers all of them and returns an object. Each separate call is a full model round-trip.
blocks.zh: 重要提示：批量检查。不要针对 N 个问题进行 N 个串行 eval_js 调用 - 编写一个片段来回答所有问题并返回一个对象。每个单独的调用都是一个完整的模型往返。

blocks.original:
Examples:
- "document.title" → returns the page title
- "document.querySelectorAll('button').length" → returns button count
- "[...document.querySelectorAll('h1')].map(el => el.textContent)" → returns array of h1 texts
- Batch: "({btnCount: document.querySelectorAll('button').length, hasNav: !!document.querySelector('nav'), bodyBg: getComputedStyle(document.body).background})" → one call, three answers. Wrap the object in parens so it's an expression; the tool JSON-serializes the return value for you.
blocks.zh:
示例：
- "document.title" → 返回页面标题
- "document.querySelectorAll('button').length" → 返回按钮数量
- "[...document.querySelectorAll('h1')].map(el => el.textContent)" → 返回 h1 文本数组
- Batch: "({btnCount: document.querySelectorAll('button').length, hasNav: !!document.querySelector('nav'), bodyBg: getCompulatedStyle(document.body).background})" → 一次调用，三个答案。将对象括在括号中，使其成为一个表达式；该工具会为您将返回值进行 JSON 序列化。

blocks.original: Never clear or remove localStorage/sessionStorage/indexedDB entries — storage is shared with the user's live view and may hold their work.
blocks.zh: 切勿清除或删除 localStorage/sessionStorage/indexedDB 条目 - 存储与用户的实时视图共享，并且可能保存他们的工作。

blocks.original: ## screenshot
blocks.zh: ＃＃ 截屏

blocks.original: [verifier-only — main agent: use ready_for_verification instead] Take a screenshot of the preview pane using html-to-image (DOM re-rendering, not a pixel capture — some CSS features like filters, clip-path, and complex shadows may render inaccurately). To inspect SEVERAL states (slides, hover/open states, scroll positions), use multi_screenshot with one step per state in a single call — never a series of separate screenshot calls; each separate call costs a full round-trip.
blocks.zh: [仅验证程序 - 主要代理：使用 Ready_for_verification 代替] 使用 html-to-image 截取预览窗格的屏幕截图（DOM 重新渲染，而不是像素捕获 - 某些 CSS 功能（如过滤器、剪辑路径和复杂阴影）可能会渲染不准确）。要检查多个状态（幻灯片、悬停/打开状态、滚动位置），请使用 multi_screenshot，在一次调用中每个状态一个步骤 - 而不是一系列单独的屏幕截图调用；每个单独的调用都会花费一个完整的往返时间。

blocks.original: ## run_script
blocks.zh: ## 运行脚本

blocks.original: Execute an async JavaScript script to programmatically manipulate project files and images.
blocks.zh: 执行异步 JavaScript 脚本以编程方式操作项目文件和图像。

blocks.original:
Use this when you need to do batch or programmatic operations that would be tedious with individual tool calls — for example:
- Read several files and concatenate or transform them
- Find-and-replace across file contents
- Load an image, get its dimensions, draw on it with Canvas, and save the result
- Compose an image by layering text, shapes, or other images using Canvas
- Generate files programmatically (e.g. build an HTML file from data)
blocks.zh:
当您需要执行批处理或编程操作时，请使用此操作，而这些操作对于单独的工具调用来说会很乏味 - 例如：
- 读取多个文件并连接或转换它们
- 跨文件内容查找和替换
- 加载图像，获取其尺寸，使用 Canvas 在其上绘图，然后保存结果
- 使用 Canvas 通过分层文本、形状或其他图像来构建图像
- 以编程方式生成文件（例如从数据构建 HTML 文件）

blocks.original: The script runs in an async context with these helpers available:
blocks.zh: 该脚本在异步上下文中运行，并提供以下帮助程序：

blocks.original:
log(...args)                      Log output (visible to you in the result)  
  await readFile(path)              Read a project file as UTF-8 string  
  await readFileBinary(path)        Read a project file as a Blob (for binary data)  
  await readImage(path)             Load an image as HTMLImageElement (for canvas drawing)  
  await saveFile(path, data)        Save a file. data can be:
                                      - string (saved as text)
                                      - Canvas element (exported as PNG)
                                      - Blob (saved with its MIME type)
blocks.zh:
log(...args) 日志输出（在结果中可见）  
  wait readFile(path) 以 UTF-8 字符串形式读取项目文件  
  wait readFileBinary(path) 以 Blob 形式读取项目文件（对于二进制数据）  
  等待 readImage(path) 将图像加载为 HTMLImageElement（用于画布绘制）  
  wait saveFile(path, data) 保存文件。数据可以是：
                                      - 字符串（另存为文本）
                                      - 画布元素（导出为 PNG）
                                      - Blob（以其 MIME 类型保存）

blocks.original:
await ls(path?)                   List file names in a directory  
  await getCaptures(key)            Retrieve Blob[] stashed by save_screenshot's in_memory_png_key  
  createCanvas(width, height)       Create a canvas for drawing  
  replaceText(text, find, replace)  Replace every occurrence of find with replace,  
                                    treating both as literal text. Prefer this over  
                                    String.replace(), which interprets $& $' $1 etc.  
                                    in the replacement and can corrupt currency or  
                                    template strings.
blocks.zh:
wait ls(path?) 列出目录中的文件名  
  wait getCaptures(key) 检索 save_screenshot 的 in_memory_png_key 隐藏的 Blob[]  
  createCanvas(width, height) 创建画布用于绘图  
  ReplaceText(text, find, Replace) 用replace替换所有出现的find，  
                                    将两者视为文字文本。更喜欢这个  
                                    String.replace()，它解释 $& $' $1 等。  
                                    在更换中可能会损坏货币或  
                                    模板字符串。

blocks.original: Example — load an image, draw text on it, save:
blocks.zh: 示例 - 加载图像，在其上绘制文本，保存：

blocks.original: Example — concatenate files:
blocks.zh: 示例 - 连接文件：

blocks.original: Example — find-and-replace across a file:
blocks.zh: 示例 - 跨文件查找和替换：

blocks.original: For a single edit to a single file, prefer the str_replace_edit tool instead — it verifies the match is unique and reports a clear error if not.
blocks.zh: 对于对单个文件的单次编辑，最好使用 str_replace_edit 工具 - 它会验证匹配是否唯一，如果不是，则报告明确的错误。

blocks.original: Do NOT use this for bulk copy of binary files -- it will not work! Use the copy_files tool instead.
blocks.zh: 不要使用它来批量复制二进制文件——它不起作用！请改用 copy_files 工具。

blocks.original: All saveFile calls are buffered and committed together after the script finishes. If the script throws, nothing is written. A large set of files is committed in more than one request; if a later request fails, the error tells you how many files (and which) were already written, so you can resume rather than re-running everything. Overwrites that would shrink an existing file by more than half are refused as a safeguard against truncation bugs — check the script produced complete output.
blocks.zh: 脚本完成后，所有 saveFile 调用都会被缓冲并一起提交。如果脚本抛出异常，则不会写入任何内容。在多个请求中提交一大组文件；如果稍后的请求失败，该错误会告诉您已经写入了多少个文件（以及哪些文件），因此您可以恢复而不是重新运行所有内容。会拒绝将现有文件缩小一半以上的覆盖，以防止截断错误 - 检查脚本生成的完整输出。

blocks.original: Timeout: 30 seconds. Errors are returned to you so you can fix and retry.
blocks.zh: 超时：30 秒。错误将返回给您，以便您可以修复并重试。

blocks.original: ## gen_pptx
blocks.zh: ## gen_pptx

blocks.original: Export the deck currently showing in the user's preview to a .pptx file and trigger a download.
blocks.zh: 将用户预览中当前显示的幻灯片导出为 .pptx 文件并触发下载。

blocks.original: The deck MUST be showing in the user's preview first — call show_to_user with the deck's HTML path before this tool.
blocks.zh: 该牌组必须首先显示在用户的预览中 - 在此工具之前使用该牌组的 HTML 路径调用 show_to_user。

blocks.original: Runs a synthetic DOM capture per slide (you don't write the capture script). 'editable' mode emits native PowerPoint text boxes/shapes/images; 'screenshots' mode emits a full-bleed PNG per slide.
blocks.zh: 对每张幻灯片运行合成 DOM 捕获（您无需编写捕获脚本）。 “可编辑”模式发出本机 PowerPoint 文本框/形状/图像； “屏幕截图”模式为每张幻灯片发出全出血 PNG。

blocks.original: Speaker notes are read automatically from `<script type="application/json" id="speaker-notes">` and attached by index.
blocks.zh: 演讲者备注会自动从 `<script type="application/json" id="speaker-notes">` 中读取并通过索引附加。

blocks.original: Returns validation flags so you can detect a bad capture without seeing the file. Read each flag's message and decide if it's expected for THIS deck — duplicate_adjacent means showJs probably didn't navigate; slide_size_mismatch means the selector or resetTransformSelector is wrong; no_speaker_notes is fine if the deck has no notes. If flags look like real problems, fix the inputs and retry.
blocks.zh: 返回验证标志，以便您可以在不查看文件的情况下检测到错误的捕获。阅读每个标志的消息，并确定该牌组是否需要该消息——duplicate_adjacent 意味着 showJs 可能没有导航； Slide_size_mismatch 表示选择器或resetTransformSelector 错误；如果套牌没有音符，则 no_speaker_notes 没问题。如果标志看起来确实有问题，请修复输入并重试。

blocks.original: The page reloads automatically after capture; DOM mutations (hidden chrome, font swaps, transform reset) are reverted.
blocks.zh: 捕获后页面自动重新加载； DOM 突变（隐藏镶边、字体交换、变换重置）被恢复。

blocks.original: ## super_inline_html
blocks.zh: ## super_inline_html

blocks.original: Bundle an HTML file and all its referenced assets (images, CSS, JS, fonts, ext-resource-dependency meta tags) into a single self-contained HTML file that works offline. `<a href>` links to other .html files in the project are followed transitively and every reachable page is bundled into the same output with hash-based navigation. Runs a deterministic browser-side bundler. The output file is written to the project and can be opened with show_html or presented for download.
blocks.zh: 将 HTML 文件及其所有引用的资源（图像、CSS、JS、字体、ext-resource-dependency 元标记）捆绑到一个可离线工作的独立 HTML 文件中。指向项目中其他 .html 文件的“<a href>”链接是可传递的，并且每个可访问的页面都通过基于哈希的导航捆绑到相同的输出中。运行确定性浏览器端捆绑器。输出文件被写入项目，可以使用 show_html 打开或提供下载。

blocks.original: The input HTML MUST contain a `<template id="__bundler_thumbnail">` with a simple colorful-bg iconographic SVG preview (30% padding on each side) — this is shown as a splash while the bundle unpacks and as the no-JS fallback. A simple icon, glyph or 1-2 letters will do.
blocks.zh: 输入 HTML 必须包含一个 `<template id="__bundler_thumbnail">` 和一个简单的 colorful-bg 图标 SVG 预览（每边 30% 填充）——这在捆绑包解压时显示为启动画面，并且作为无 JS 后备。一个简单的图标、字形或 1-2 个字母即可。

blocks.original: ## bundle_project
blocks.zh: ## 捆绑项目

blocks.original: Bundle an HTML design into a single self-contained file and return a short-lived public URL for it, suitable for handing to a partner service's import-from-url tool. Runs the same inliner as super_inline_html, writes the result to the project, and mints a URL that expires in ~10 minutes and stops working after a few fetches.
blocks.zh: 将 HTML 设计捆绑到一个独立的文件中，并为其返回一个短暂的公共 URL，适合交给合作伙伴服务的 import-from-url 工具。运行与 super_inline_html 相同的内联器，将结果写入项目，并创建一个在约 10 分钟内过期的 URL，并在几次提取后停止工作。

blocks.original: Returns {url, bundled_path, size_bytes, expires_at}. The URL is single-use in practice — call the partner's import tool immediately and do not reuse the URL across retries; call this tool again for a fresh one.
blocks.zh: 返回 {url、bundled_pa​​th、size_bytes、expires_at}。该 URL 在实践中是一次性使用的——立即调用合作伙伴的导入工具，并且不要在重试时重复使用该 URL；再次调用此工具以获得新工具。

blocks.original: The input HTML MUST contain a `<template id="__bundler_thumbnail">` splash (same requirement as super_inline_html).
blocks.zh: 输入 HTML 必须包含 `<template id="__bundler_thumbnail">` 醒目内容（与 super_inline_html 的要求相同）。

blocks.original: ## open_for_print
blocks.zh: ## 打开打印

blocks.original: Open an HTML file in a new browser tab for printing / saving as PDF. The user can then press Cmd+P (Mac) or Ctrl+P (Windows) to save as PDF.
blocks.zh: 在新的浏览器选项卡中打开 HTML 文件以打印/另存为 PDF。然后，用户可以按 Cmd+P (Mac) 或 Ctrl+P (Windows) 将另存为 PDF。

blocks.original: ## present_fs_item_for_download
blocks.zh: ##present_fs_item_for_download

blocks.original: Present a file, folder, or the whole project, as a downloadable file to the user. A clickable download card will appear in the chat. If the path is a folder, will be turned into a zip file.
blocks.zh: 将文件、文件夹或整个项目作为可下载文件呈现给用户。聊天中将出现可点击的下载卡。如果路径是文件夹，则会转成zip文件。

blocks.original: ## get_public_file_url
blocks.zh: ## 获取公共文件 URL

blocks.original: Get a publicly-fetchable URL for a file in this project. The URL is short-lived (~1h), served from a sandbox origin, and authorizes ONLY this one file — relative subresources (images/CSS/JS referenced from an HTML file) will NOT load. For an HTML design with project-relative assets, run super_inline_html (or bundle_project) first and call this on the self-contained output. Use this when an external service (e.g. Canva import) needs to fetch a project file by URL.
blocks.zh: 获取此项目中文件的可公开获取的 URL。该 URL 是短暂的 (~1h)，从沙箱源提供服务，并且仅授权此一个文件 - 相关子资源（从 HTML 文件引用的图像/CSS/JS）将不会加载。对于具有项目相关资源的 HTML 设计，请首先运行 super_inline_html （或 bundle_project）并在独立输出上调用它。当外部服务（例如 Canva 导入）需要通过 URL 获取项目文件时使用此选项。

blocks.original: ## update_todos
blocks.zh: ## 更新全部

blocks.original: Track your task list. Use this tool whenever you have more than one discrete task to do, or whenever given a long-running or multi-step task. Use liberally. Call early to lay out your plan, then call it again as you complete, add, or remove tasks.
blocks.zh: 跟踪您的任务列表。当您有多个离散任务需要执行时，或者当您需要执行一项长时间运行或多步骤的任务时，请使用此工具。随意使用。尽早致电制定您的计划，然后在完成、添加或删除任务时再次致电。

blocks.original:
Provide an array of modification operations:
- add: create a new task (provide "name")
- complete: (provide "id" of task from a previous result)
- remove: delete a task by id (provide "id")
blocks.zh:
提供一系列修改操作：
- 添加：创建一个新任务（提供“名称”）
- 完成：（提供先前结果中任务的“id”）
- 删除：通过 id 删除任务（提供“id”）

blocks.original: Because this tool is just for you (and to show the user) you can call it and then immediately call an action in the same block, for speed. No need to wait.
blocks.zh: 因为这个工具仅供您使用（并向用户展示），您可以调用它，然后立即调用同一块中的操作，以提高速度。无需等待。

blocks.original: ## read_skill_prompt
blocks.zh: ## 阅读技能提示

blocks.original: Read a built-in skill's prompt by name. Returns the skill's full instructions as text for you to follow. Use this when the user asks for something that matches a skill you know about but whose prompt is not already in context.
blocks.zh: 按名称阅读内置技能的提示。以文本形式返回技能的完整说明，供您遵循。当用户询问的内容与您了解的技能相匹配但其提示尚未在上下文中时，请使用此选项。

blocks.original: ## questions_v2
blocks.zh: ## questions_v2

blocks.original: Present a structured question form to the user for gathering design preferences. Use liberally when starting something new or the ask is ambiguous. Call AFTER reading files and research, BEFORE planning or building.
blocks.zh: 向用户呈现结构化问题表以收集设计偏好。当开始新事物或要求不明确时，请自由使用。在阅读文件和研究之后、规划或建设之前致电。

blocks.original: Output a JSON blob (NOT html). The UI renders native components for each question. Questions stream in as you write them — keep the most important ones first.
blocks.zh: 输出 JSON blob（不是 html）。 UI 为每个问题呈现本机组件。当你写下问题时，问题就会源源不断地出现——把最重要的问题放在第一位。

blocks.original:
Question kinds:
- text-options — radio (single) or checkbox (multi) pick from a list of text labels. ALWAYS include these two options: "Explore a few options" and "Decide for me". Also include "Other" for open-ended input.
- svg-options — same but each option is an inline SVG string (~80×56 viewBox). Use for visual choices: layouts, icon styles, color swatches rendered as SVG.
- slider — numeric range with min/max/step/default. Be generous with ranges; users often want to go further than you'd expect. Only tight-bound when physically meaningful (opacity 0-1, volume 0-100).
- file — file picker. User-uploaded file is written to uploads/ and the project-relative path is returned as the answer.
- freeform — plain textarea for open-ended input.
blocks.zh:
问题种类：
- 文本选项 — 从文本标签列表中选择单选（单个）或复选框（多个）。始终包含这两个选项：“探索几个选项”和“为我做决定”。还包括用于开放式输入的“其他”。
- svg-options — 相同，但每个选项都是内联 SVG 字符串（~80×56 viewBox）。用于视觉选择：布局、图标样式、渲染为 SVG 的颜色样本。
- 滑块 — 具有最小/最大/步长/默认值的数字范围。范围要大方；用户通常想要比你想象的更进一步。仅在具有物理意义时才紧束缚（不透明度 0-1，体积 0-100）。
- 文件 — 文件选择器。用户上传的文件被写入 uploads/ 并返回项目相对路径作为答案。
- 自由格式 — 用于开放式输入的纯文本区域。

blocks.original: Keep titles short, subtitles optional. It's better to ask too many questions than too few.
blocks.zh: 标题简短，字幕可选。问太多问题比问太少问题要好。

blocks.original: ## get_comments
blocks.zh: ## 获取评论

blocks.original: Read unresolved comments left on this project by collaborators. Only call this when the user explicitly asks about comments or asks you to address them. Returns one text block; if truncated, call again with the offset shown at the end.
blocks.zh: 阅读合作者对此项目留下的未解决的评论。仅当用户明确询问评论或要求您解决这些问题时才调用此方法。返回一个文本块；如果被截断，则使用末尾显示的偏移量再次调用。

blocks.original: ## resolve_comments
blocks.zh: ## 解析评论

blocks.original: Mark one or more comments as resolved (or unresolved). Use the "id" values from get_comments.
blocks.zh: 将一条或多条评论标记为已解决（或未解决）。使用 get_comments 中的“id”值。

blocks.original: ## set_project_title
blocks.zh: ## 设置项目标题

blocks.original: Rename the current project. Use once you've identified a brand or product name so the project is findable in the org picker instead of sitting under a generic placeholder. No-op if the user has already named it.
blocks.zh: 重命名当前项目。一旦您确定了品牌或产品名称，就可以使用该项目，以便可以在组织选择器中找到该项目，而不是坐在通用占位符下。如果用户已经命名，则无操作。

blocks.original: ## connect_github
blocks.zh: ## 连接_github

blocks.original: Prompt the user to connect GitHub. Returns immediately — does NOT wait for authorization. After calling, end your turn; the other github_* tools appear once connected.
blocks.zh: 提示用户连接 GitHub。立即返回——不等待授权。叫完后，结束回合；一旦连接就会出现其他 github_* 工具。

blocks.original: ## github_list_repos
blocks.zh: ## github_list_repos

blocks.original: List repositories the connected GitHub App can access (full_name, default_branch, private, description). Scoped to where the app is INSTALLED — not all repos the user can see.
blocks.zh: 列出连接的 GitHub 应用程序可以访问的存储库（完整名称、默认分支、私有、描述）。范围仅限于应用程序的安装位置 - 并非用户可以看到所有存储库。

blocks.original: ## github_get_tree
blocks.zh: ## github_get_tree

blocks.original: List entries in a GitHub repo at a ref. path_prefix is resolved server-side BEFORE fetching, so a deep subfolder of a huge monorepo lists fine — pass one for large repos. If a recursive fetch overflows, the server falls back to a one-level listing with a NOTE; use those directory names to narrow path_prefix and retry.
blocks.zh: 在 ref 处列出 GitHub 存储库中的条目。 path_prefix 在获取之前在服务器端解析，因此大型单一存储库的深层子文件夹列表很好 - 对于大型存储库，传递一个。如果递归获取溢出，服务器将回退到带有注释的一级列表；使用这些目录名来缩小 path_prefix 范围并重试。

blocks.original: Parsing a pasted github.com URL: github.com/OWNER/REPO/tree/REF/PATH or .../blob/REF/PATH → owner/repo/ref/path. For a bare github.com/OWNER/REPO URL, use the default_branch from github_list_repos as ref (or try "main", then "master"). Pass the URL's path as path_prefix.
blocks.zh: 解析粘贴的 github.com URL：github.com/OWNER/REPO/tree/REF/PATH 或 .../blob/REF/PATH →owner/repo/ref/path。对于裸 github.com/OWNER/REPO URL，请使用 github_list_repos 中的 default_branch 作为引用（或尝试“main”，然后“master”）。将 URL 的路径作为 path_prefix 传递。

blocks.original: Start with recursive: false and drill into the directories you actually need — a recursive listing of a large asset folder dumps thousands of lines into your context for no benefit. The tree shows file NAMES only — to actually use files, follow up with github_import_files (then read_file), or github_read_file for a single file inline.
blocks.zh: 从 recursive: false 开始，深入到您实际需要的目录 - 大型资产文件夹的递归列表会将数千行转储到您的上下文中，但没有任何好处。该树仅显示文件名 - 要实际使用文件，请使用 github_import_files （然后是 read_file），或 github_read_file 对于单个文件内联。

blocks.original: ## github_read_file
blocks.zh: ## github_read_file

blocks.original: Read one file from a GitHub repo WITHOUT importing it (up to ~5MB). Returns text inline; for binary files (images, fonts) it reports the size and tells you to import it via github_import_files paths=[…]. Good for orientation files (README.md, package.json) before deciding what to import.
blocks.zh: 从 GitHub 存储库读取一个文件而不导入它（最多约 5MB）。返回内联文本；对于二进制文件（图像、字体），它会报告大小并告诉您通过 github_import_files paths=[...] 导入它。适合在决定导入内容之前定位文件（README.md、package.json）。

blocks.original: ## github_import_files
blocks.zh: ## github_import_files

blocks.original:
Copy files from a GitHub repo into this project. Two modes:
- paths: explicit list of file paths (up to 50). Cherry-pick specific assets — a logo, three fonts, one stylesheet. Lands at the full repo path.
- path_prefix: import an entire subfolder (prefix stripped, so docs/guide.md lands as guide.md). Hard 500-file cap after the import filter (text + image/font assets).
blocks.zh:
将文件从 GitHub 存储库复制到此项目中。两种模式：
- 路径：文件路径的显式列表（最多 50 个）。精挑细选特定资产——一个徽标、三种字体、一个样式表。落在完整的回购路径上。
- path_prefix：导入整个子文件夹（前缀被删除，因此 docs/guide.md 变为guide.md）。导入过滤器后的硬性上限为 500 个文件（文本 + 图像/字体资源）。

blocks.original: Use paths for single files or when the subfolder is too large. Use ls after to see where files landed.
blocks.zh: 对单个文件或子文件夹太大时使用路径。使用 ls after 查看文件到达的位置。

blocks.original: When the user asks you to mock, recreate, or copy a repo's UI: importing is not optional — complete the full chain github_get_tree → github_import_files → read_file on the imported files. Target theme/color tokens (theme.ts, colors.ts, tokens.css, _variables.scss), the specific components the user mentioned, and global stylesheets / layout scaffolds. Read them and lift exact values — hex codes, spacing scales, font stacks, border radii. The goal is pixel fidelity to what's actually in the repo, not your recollection of what the app roughly looks like.
blocks.zh: 当用户要求您模拟、重新创建或复制存储库的 UI 时：导入不是可选的 - 在导入的文件上完成完整的链 github_get_tree → github_import_files → read_file。目标主题/颜色标记（theme.ts、colors.ts、tokens.css、_variables.scss）、用户提到的特定组件以及全局样式表/布局脚手架。阅读它们并获取精确值——十六进制代码、间距比例、字体堆栈、边框半径。目标是对存储库中实际内容的像素保真度，而不是您对应用程序大致外观的回忆。

blocks.original: ## github_prompt_install
blocks.zh: ## github_prompt_install

blocks.original: Show an inline "Install GitHub App" banner. Call ONCE after a github_* tool 404s on a private repo the user expects to access, then end your turn.
blocks.zh: 显示内嵌的“安装 GitHub 应用程序”横幅。在用户希望访问的私有存储库上的 github_* 工具 404s 后调用一次，然后结束您的回合。

blocks.original: ## verification_feedback
blocks.zh: ## 验证_反馈

blocks.original: [verifier-only] Report your verification verdict and terminate. Call this ONCE when you are done checking. verdict: "done" if the output looks correct (layout, no console errors, content renders as intended); "needs_work" ONLY if there are real, actionable problems — not nitpicks. needs_work wakes the main agent to fix the issues you describe.
blocks.zh: [仅限验证者] 报告您的验证结论并终止。完成检查后调用一次。结论：如果输出看起来正确（布局、没有控制台错误、内容按预期呈现），则“完成”； “needs_work”仅当存在真实的、可操作的问题时——而不是吹毛求疵。 need_work 唤醒主代理来解决您描述的问题。

blocks.original: ## dc_write
blocks.zh: ## dc_write

blocks.original: Write (or wholly rewrite) a Design Component. The template streams into the live preview as you write it; the logic applies on completion. For small changes to an existing DC prefer dc_html_str_replace / dc_js_str_replace.
blocks.zh: 编写（或完全重写）设计组件。当您编写模板时，模板会流入实时预览中；逻辑在完成时应用。对于现有 DC 的小更改，首选 dc_html_str_replace / dc_js_str_replace。

blocks.original: ## dc_html_str_replace
blocks.zh: ## dc_html_str_replace

blocks.original: Edit a Design Component's template by exact string replacement. The replacement streams into the live preview as d_replace arrives. For the logic class use dc_js_str_replace.
blocks.zh: 通过精确的字符串替换来编辑设计组件的模板。当 d_replace 到达时，替换流将进入实时预览。对于逻辑类，请使用 dc_js_str_replace。

blocks.original: ## dc_js_str_replace
blocks.zh: ## dc_js_str_replace

blocks.original: Like dc_html_str_replace but for the component's logic class instead of its template. Does not stream live — the runtime hot-reloads the class on completion.
blocks.zh: 与 dc_html_str_replace 类似，但用于组件的逻辑类而不是其模板。不进行实时流式传输 - 运行时在完成时热重新加载类。

blocks.original: ## dc_set_props
blocks.zh: ## dc_set_props

blocks.original: Set a Design Component's data-props JSON (the Tweaks metadata on its `<script data-dc-script>` tag). Use this to add, change, or remove tweakable props on an existing DC.
blocks.zh: 设置设计组件的 data-props JSON（其“<script data-dc-script>”标记上的调整元数据）。使用它来添加、更改或删除现有 DC 上的可调整道具。

blocks.original: ## snip
blocks.zh: ## 剪断

blocks.original: Mark a range of conversation history for deferred removal.
blocks.zh: 将一系列对话历史记录标记为延迟删除。

blocks.original: Each user message ends with an [id:mNNNN] tag. Copy the exact tag values as from_id and to_id — do not guess IDs, find the actual tags on the messages you want to remove. Both IDs are inclusive: snip({from_id: "m0003", to_id: "m0007"}) removes m0003 through m0007. To remove a single message, use the same ID for both.
blocks.zh: 每条用户消息都以 [id:mNNNN] 标签结尾。将确切的标签值复制为 from_id 和 to_id — 不要猜测 ID，找到要删除的邮件上的实际标签。两个 ID 均包含在内：snip({from_id: "m0003", to_id: "m0007"}) 删除 m0003 到 m0007。要删除单条消息，请对两条消息使用相同的 ID。

blocks.original: Snips are a REGISTRATION system, not immediate deletion. Registering is cheap and non-destructive — messages stay visible until context pressure builds, then all registered snips execute together. Register aggressively and early.
blocks.zh: 剪辑是一个注册系统，而不是立即删除。注册成本低廉且非破坏性——消息保持可见，直到上下文压力建立，然后所有注册的片段一起执行。尽早积极注册。

blocks.original: Register MANY snips. After finishing any distinct chunk of work, immediately register a snip for it. Good candidates: resolved explorations, completed multi-step operations whose intermediate steps are no longer needed, long tool outputs that have been acted upon, earlier drafts superseded by later versions.
blocks.zh: 注册许多剪辑。完成任何明显的工作块后，立即为其注册一个片段。好的候选者：已解决的探索、已完成的多步骤操作（不再需要中间步骤）、已采取行动的长工具输出、较新版本取代的早期草案。

blocks.original: You can call this multiple times to mark different ranges. Snipped content is silently removed with no placeholder — capture anything you still need (in a summary, file, or your response) before snipping.
blocks.zh: 您可以多次调用它来标记不同的范围。剪切的内容会被悄悄删除，没有占位符 - 在剪切之前捕获您仍然需要的任何内容（在摘要、文件或您的回复中）。

 * 手柄：

 * 并将 {slideIndexChanged: N} 发布到导航上的父窗口。

blocks.original:
e stage goes
 *      prev/next — taps on links, buttons and other interactive slide
 *      content are left alone.
 *  (c) press R to reset to slide 0 (with a tasteful keyboard hint).
 *  (d) bottom-center overlay showing slide count + hints, fades out on idle.
 *  (e) auto-scaling — inner canvas is a fixed design size (default 1920×1080)
 *      scaled with `transform: scale()` to fit the viewport, letterboxed.
 *      Set the `noscale` attribute to render at authored size (1:1) — the
 *      PPTX exporter sets this so its DOM capture sees unscaled geometry.
 *  (f) print — `@media print` lays every slide out as its own page at the
 *      design size, so the browser's Print → Save as PDF produces a clean
 *      one-page-per-slide PDF with no extra setup.
 *  (g) thumbnail rail — resizable left-hand column of per-slide thumbnails
 *      (static clones). Click to navigate; ↑/↓ with a thumbnail focused to
 *      step between slides; drag to reorder; right-click for
 *      Skip / Move up / Move down / Duplicate / Delete (Delete opens a
 *      Cancel/Delete confirm dialog). Drag the rail's right edge to resize;
 *      width persists to
 *      localStorage. Skipped slides carry

e 舞台开始

 * (c) 按 R 重置为幻灯片 0（带有雅致的键盘提示）。
 * (d) 底部中心覆盖层显示幻灯片计数 + 提示，空闲时淡出。
 * (e) 自动缩放——内部画布是固定的设计尺寸（默认1920×1080）
 * 使用“transform:scale()”进行缩放以适合视口，信箱式。
 * 设置 `noscale` 属性以创作尺寸 (1:1) 渲染 —
 * PPTX 导出器设置此项，以便其 DOM 捕获看到未缩放的几何图形。
 * (f) 打印 — `@media print` 将每张幻灯片作为其自己的页面放置在
 * 设计尺寸，以便浏览器的打印 → 另存为 PDF 产生干净的

 *      the rail, omitted from prev/next navigation, and hidden at print.
 *      The rail is suppressed in presenting mode, in the host's Preview
 *      mode (ViewerMode='none'), on `noscale`, on narrow viewports
 *      (≤640px), and via the `no-rail` attribute. Rail mutations dispatch

 *      NOT touch the DOM: the host applies the op and re-renders;

 *
 * Slides are HIDDEN, not unmounted. Non-active slides stay in the DOM with
 * `visibility: hidden` + `opacity: 0`, so their state (videos, iframes,
 * form inputs, React trees) is preserved across navigation.

 * Lifecycle event — the component dispatches a `slidechange` CustomEvent on
 * itself whenever the active slide changes (including the initial mount).
 * The event bubbles and composes out of shadow DOM, so you can listen on
 * the <deck-stage> element or on document:
 *

 *     e.detail.index         // new 0-based index
 *     e.detail

blocks.original:
.previousIndex // previous index, or -1 on init
 *     e.detail.total         // total slide count
 *     e.detail.slide         // the new active slide element
 *     e.detail.previousSlide // the prior slide element, or null on init
 *     e.detail.reason        // 'init' | 'keyboard' | 'click' | 'tap' | 'api'
 *   });
 *
 * Persistence: none at the deck level. The host app keeps the current slide
 * in its own URL (?slide=) and re-delivers it via location.hash on load, so a
 * bare load with no hash always starts at slide 1.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   <style>deck-stage:not(:defined){visibility:hidden}</style>
 *   <deck-stage width="1920" height="1080">
 *     <section data-label="Title">...</section>
 *     <section data-label="Agenda">...</section>
 *   </deck-stage>
 *   <script src="deck-stage.js"></script>
 *
 * The :not(:defined) rule prevents a flash of the first slide at its
 * authored styles before this script runs and attaches the shadow root.
 *
 * Slides are the direct element children of <deck-stage>. Each slide is
 * automatically tagged with:
 *   - data-screen-label="NN Label"   (1-indexed, for comment flow)
 *   - data-om-validate="no_overflowing_text,no_overlapping_tex

 * 没有哈希值的裸负载始终从幻灯片 1 开始。

t,slide_sized_text"
 *
 * Speaker notes stay in sync because the component posts {slideIndexChanged: N}
 * to the parent — just include the #speaker-notes script tag if asked for notes.
 *
 * Authoring guidance:
 *   - Write slide bodies as static HTML inside <deck-stage>, with sizing via
 *     CSS custom properties in a <style> block rather than JS constants.
 *     Static slide markup is what lets the user click a heading in edit mode
 *     and retype it directly; a slide rendered through <script type="text/babel">,
 *     React, or a loop over a JS array has to round-trip every tweak through a
 *     chat message instead. Reach for script-generated slides only when the
 *     content genuinely needs interactive behaviour static HTML can't express.
 *   - Do NOT set position/inset/width/height on the slide <section> elements —
 *     the component absolutely positions every slotted child for you.
 *   - Entrance animations: make the visible end-state the base style and
 *     animate *from* hidden, so print and reduced-motion show content.
 *     Gate the animation on [data-deck-active] and the motion query, e.g.
 *     `@media (prefers-reduced-motion:no-preference){ [data-deck

     * 通过 dc-runtime 重新渲染； slotchange 将导轨拉上。
     *结构操作锁定导轨输入，直到主机快速确认

     * `newIndex` 被写入 location.hash 以便 slotchange 的
     * _restoreIndex 位于右侧幻灯片上。
     *
     * 没有 dc-runtime（原始 .html 平台），就没有重新渲染路径，

blocks.original:
```js
// @ds-adherence-ignore -- omelette starter scaffold (raw elements/hex/px by design)
/* BEGIN USAGE */
/**
 * <image-slot> — user-fillable image placeholder.
 *
 * Drop this into a deck, mockup, or page wherever you want the user to
 * supply an image. You control the slot's shape and size; the user fills it
 * by dragging an image file onto it (or clicking to browse). The dropped
 * image persists across reloads via a .image-slots.state.json sidecar —
 * same read-via-fetch / write-via-window.omelette pattern as
 * design_canvas.jsx, so the filled slot shows on share links, downloaded
 * zips, and PPTX export. Outside the omelette runtime the slot is read-only.
 *
 * The host bridge only allows sidecar writes at the project root, so the
 * HTML that uses this component is assumed to live at the project root too
 * (same constraint as design_canvas.jsx).
 *
 * Attributes:
 *   id           Persistence key. REQUIRED for the drop to survive reload —
 *                every slot on the page needs a distinct id.
 *   shape        'rect' | 'rounded' | 'circle' | 'pill'   (default 'rounded')
 *                'circle' applies 50% border-radius; on a non-square slot
 *
blocks.zh:
````js
// @ds-adherence-ignore -- 煎蛋卷起始支架（原始元素/十六进制/像素设计）
/* 开始使用 */
/**
 * <image-slot> — 用户可填写的图像占位符。
 *
 * 将其放入平台、模型或页面中您希望用户放置的任何位置
 * 提供图像。您可以控制槽的形状和大小；用户填写它
 * 通过将图像文件拖到其上（或单击浏览）。掉落的
 * 图像通过 .image-slots.state.json sidecar 在重新加载时保持不变 —
 * 与 read-via-fetch / write-via-window.omelette 模式相同
 * design_canvas.jsx，因此填充的插槽显示在共享链接上，已下载
 * zip 和 PPTX 导出。在煎蛋卷运行时之外，该槽是只读的。
 *
 * 主桥仅允许在项目根目录下写入 sidecar，因此
 * 使用该组件的 HTML 也被假定位于项目根目录
 *（与 design_canvas.jsx 相同的约束）。
 *
 * 属性：
 * id 持久化密钥。需要掉落物才能重新加载 -
 * 页面上的每个槽位都需要一个不同的 ID。
 * 形状'矩形' | '圆形' | '圆圈' | '药丸'（默认'圆形'）
 *“圆”适用 50% 边界半径；在非方形槽上
 *

blocks.original:
that's an ellipse — set equal width and height for a true
 *                circle.
 *   radius       Corner radius in px for 'rounded'.       (default 12)
 *   mask         Any CSS clip-path value. Overrides `shape` — use this for
 *                hexagons, blobs, arbitrary polygons.
 *   fit          object-fit: cover | contain | fill.       (default 'cover')
 *                With cover (the default) double-clicking the filled slot
 *                enters a reframe mode: the whole image spills past the mask
 *                (translucent outside, opaque inside), drag to reposition,
 *                corner-drag to scale. The crop persists alongside the image
 *                in the sidecar. contain/fill stay static.
 *   position     object-position for fit=contain|fill.     (default '50% 50%')
 *   placeholder  Empty-state caption.                      (default 'Drop an image')
 *   src          Optional initial/fallback image URL. A user drop overrides
 *                it; clearing the drop reveals src again.
 *
 * Size and layout come from ordinary CSS on the element — width/height
 * inline or from a parent grid — so it composes with any layout.
 *
 * Usage:
 *   <imag
blocks.zh:
那是一个椭圆——为真实的椭圆设置相等的宽度和高度

 * radius 以 px 为单位的圆角半径，表示“圆角”。       （默认 12）
 * mask 任何 CSS 剪辑路径值。覆盖 `shape` — 使用它

 * 适合对象适合： 覆盖 |包含|充满。       （默认“覆盖”）
 * 带盖（默认）双击已填充的槽位
 * 进入重新构图模式：整个图像溢出遮罩
 *（外部半透明，内部不透明），拖动以重新定位，
 * 角拖动以缩放。裁剪与图像一起保留
 * 在边车中。包含/填充保持静态。
 * 定位对象位置 fit=contain|fill。     （默认“50% 50%”）
 * 占位符 空状态标题。                      （默认“删除图像”）
 * src 可选的初始/后备图像 URL。用户删除覆盖

 *
 * 大小和布局来自元素上的普通 CSS - 宽度/高度
 * 内联或来自父网格 - 因此它可以与任何布局组合。

blocks.original: ## metrics-overlay.js
blocks.zh: ## 指标-overlay.js

blocks.original:
```js
// @ds-adherence-ignore -- omelette starter scaffold (raw elements/hex/px by design)
/* BEGIN USAGE */
/**
 * <metrics-overlay> — product-metrics overlay.
 *
 * Wraps any rendered UI and paints a metric glyph onto every descendant
 * that carries data-metric-id="…". The component owns no data: it loads a
 * static snapshot file the agent wrote (via the BigQuery / analytics
 * connector) and, when the user asks for filters the snapshot can't answer,
 * posts ONE message back to the host asking the agent to re-query and
 * append a fresh entry to that file's entries[] cache.
 *
 * Attributes:
 *   src           URL of the snapshot file. Re-fetched when this attribute
 *                 changes and on a 'metrics:reload' event. Omit only when
 *                 the host has already assigned window[<global>] itself.
 *                 .js  → loaded via <script src>, snapshot must assign
 *                        window[<global>] (see below). Lets the snapshot
 *                        ship helpers (sliceSum, fmtN) the adapter uses.
 *                 .json → fetch()ed; no helpers, no global attr needed.
 *   global        Name of the window.* key the .js snapshot assigns.
 *
blocks.zh:
````js
// @ds-adherence-ignore -- 煎蛋卷起始支架（原始元素/十六进制/像素设计）
/* 开始使用 */
/**
 * <metrics-overlay> — 产品指标叠加。
 *
 * 包装任何渲染的 UI 并在每个后代上绘制公制字形
 * 带有 data-metric-id="..."。该组件不拥有任何数据：它加载一个
 * 代理写入的静态快照文件（通过 BigQuery/analytics
 * 连接器），并且当用户请求过滤器时快照无法回答，
 * 将一条消息发回主机，要求代理重新查询并
 * 将新条目附加到该文件的条目[]缓存中。
 *
 * 属性：
 * 快照文件的 src URL。当该属性被重新获取时
 * 更改和“metrics:reload”事件。仅当以下情况时才省略
 * 主机已经分配了 window[<global>] 本身。
 * .js → 通过 <script src> 加载，快照必须分配
 * 窗口[<全局>]（见下文）。让快照
 * 适配器使用的船舶助手（sliceSum、fmtN）。
 * .json → fetch()ed;无需助手，无需全局属性。
 * 窗口的全局名称。* .js 快照分配的键。
 *

blocks.original:
REQUIRED for .js src, ignored for .json.
 *   mode          'heat' | 'badges' | 'space'
 *                 (extensible via MetricsOverlay.registerMode). Default 'heat'.
 *                 The attribute also accepts 'off' (passthrough — see the
 *                 tweak recipe below); 'off' is not a selectable mode.
 *   window        1 | 3 | 7 | 'range' — day count. Default '7'. Presets
 *                 re-slice the loaded snapshot's daily arrays client-side;
 *                 'range' (with from/to) is answered only by an entry
 *                 fetched for exactly that range, otherwise it's a refetch.
 *   from, to      ISO datetimes (yyyy-mm-ddTHH:mm, local); read only when
 *                 window='range'. A custom range puts the overlay into
 *                 'stale' state unless an entry fetched for that exact
 *                 range is already cached.
 *   lens          Cohort key from snapshot.cohorts[].tier, or ''. Default ''.
 *   controls      'sentence' | 'none'. Default 'sentence' — renders the
 *                 serif sentence control ("Showing heat-map for all users
 *                 over the last week.") above the stage. 'none' for headless
 *
blocks.zh:
对于 .js src 是必需的，对于 .json 则被忽略。
 * 模式“加热”| '徽章' | ‘空间’
 *（可通过 MetricsOverlay.registerMode 扩展）。默认“热”。
 * 该属性还接受“off”（直通 — 请参阅
 *调整下面的配方）； “关闭”不是可选择的模式。
 * 窗口 1 | 3 | 7 | '范围' — 天数。默认“7”。预设
 * 在客户端重新切片加载的快照的每日数组；
 *“范围”（带有从/到）仅由条目回答
 * 精确地获取该范围，否则将重新获取。
 * 从、到 ISO 日期时间（yyyy-mm-ddTHH:mm，本地）；只读时
 * 窗口='范围'。自定义范围将叠加层放入
 *“陈旧”状态，除非获取了该确切的条目
 * 范围已经被缓存。
 * 来自 snapshot.cohorts[].tier 的镜头队列键，或“”。默认 ''。
 * 控制“句子” | '没有任何'。默认 'sentence' — 呈现
 *衬线句子控制（“为所有用户显示热图
 *上周。”）舞台上方。 “无”代表无头
 *

blocks.original:
// zero times); aligned to days[]
 *     adapterOpts: { primaryScope, ... } }       // optional — configure() overrides
 *
 * There are no authored per-window or per-element-state fields. Everything —
 * reach %, trend, totals, the ● Nd "new" badge — is a fold over daily[] and
 * viewersDaily[] at the same indices, so numerator and denominator can't
 * desync and the trend arrow is same-window (rate vs prior-period rate, not
 * raw WoW).
 *
 * The file may also be a multi-entry cache keyed by the server-side filter,
 * so flipping the sentence control back to a previously-fetched filter
 * doesn't need another round-trip:
 *   { adapterOpts: {...},
 *     entries: [ { query:{},                 asOf, days, viewersDaily, elements, cohorts },
 *                { query:{lens:'pro'},       asOf, days, viewersDaily, elements, cohorts },
 *                { query:{from:'…',to:'…'},  asOf, days, viewersDaily, … } ] }
 * A single-object snapshot is normalised to {entries:[it]} on load. When
 * the user changes the lens or picks a custom range, the overlay picks the
 * newest entry whose `query` matches and re-renders from it; if none does,
 * it goes s
blocks.zh:
// 零次);与天对齐[]
 *adapterOpts: {primaryScope, ... } } // 可选——configure() 覆盖
 *
 * 没有创作的每窗口或每元素状态字段。一切——
 * 到达率、趋势、总数、 ● Nd“新”徽章 — 是每日的折叠[] 和
 *viewersDaily[] 具有相同的索引，因此分子和分母不能
 * 不同步且趋势箭头是同一窗口（利率与前期利率，而不是
 *原始魔兽世界）。
 *
 * 该文件也可能是由服务器端过滤器键入的多条目缓存，
 * 因此将句子控件翻转回先前获取的过滤器
 * 不需要另一个往返：
 * { 适配器选项: {...},
 * 条目：[ { 查询：{}、asOf、天数、viewersDaily、元素、群组 },
 * { 查询：{lens：'pro'}，asOf，天数，viewersDaily，元素，同期群 }，
 * { 查询：{from：'...'，to：'...'}，asOf，days，viewersDaily，... } ] }
 * 单对象快照在加载时标准化为 {entries:[it]}。当
 * 用户更换镜头或选择自定义范围，覆盖层选择
 * `query` 匹配并重新渲染的最新条目；如果没有人这样做，
 * 它去

blocks.original:
tale and shows Refetch. A refetch should APPEND an entry with `query` set to the
 * requested filter — never overwrite existing entries (they're the cache).
 *
 * The range control in the sentence is the user's direct filter. Picking a
 * preset (yesterday / last 3 days / last week) re-slices the loaded
 * snapshot immediately — the numbers change, no refetch. Picking a custom
 * from–to range or a cohort lens the active entry isn't scoped to marks
 * the overlay stale and shows a "Get latest numbers" button so the agent
 * re-queries and appends a matching entry.
 *
 * Host protocol — the component posts exactly one message type to
 * window.parent when the user clicks "Get latest numbers" in the sentence row:
 *
 *   { type: 'metrics:refetch',
 *     src: './metrics-data.js',          // the cache file to append an entry to
 *     filter: { window, from, to, lens, mode },
 *     reason: 'filter-unsatisfiable' | 'manual',
 *     fallbackPrompt: 'Refetch metrics-data.js from …' }
 *
 * The host sends the chat turn directly (the click is the user gesture;
 * the host builds the prompt from the structured filter fields rather than
 * trusting fallbackPrompt verbatim). The component s
blocks.zh:
故事并显示 Refetch。重新获取应附加一个将“query”设置为的条目
 * 请求的过滤器 - 永远不会覆盖现有条目（它们是缓存）。
 *
 * 句子中的范围控制是用户直接过滤。挑选一个
 *预设（昨天/最近3天/上周）重新切片加载
 * 立即快照 - 数字发生变化，无需重新获取。选择定制
 * 从-到范围或队列镜头，活动条目不限于标记
 *覆盖陈旧并显示“获取最新号码”按钮，以便代理
 * 重新查询并附加匹配的条目。
 *
 * 主机协议——组件将一种消息类型发送到
 * 当用户点击句子行中的“获取最新号码”时的window.parent：
 *
 * { 类型：'指标：重新获取'，
 * src: './metrics-data.js', // 要附加条目的缓存文件
 *过滤器：{窗口，从，到，镜头，模式}，
 * 原因：“过滤器无法满足”| '手册',
 *fallbackPrompt: '从...重新获取metrics-data.js' }
 *
 * 主持人直接发送聊天回合（点击是用户手势；
 * 主持人根据结构化过滤字段构建提示，而不是
 * 信任后备提示逐字）。该组件的

blocks.original:
hows "Getting…" and
 * shimmers the stage for up to 90s; once the agent has appended
 * a fresh entry to the snapshot file, the preview reload (or a
 * 'metrics:reload' event) clears the asked state.
 *
 * Editing a user flow in the right panel (add/remove a step, rename,
 * relabel, delete) and clicking "Get latest numbers" both post:
 *
 *   { type: 'metrics:funnel',
 *     action: 'save' | 'delete' | 'compute',
 *     src: './funnels.json',        // the file to write
 *     name: 'Prompt → create',
 *     oldName: '…',                 // present on a rename ('save' action)
 *     def: { steps:[{screen,id,ev,label,inst}], window,
 *            splitBy, asOf, hash },  // component computes hash (djb2)
 *     funnels: [...],               // the full in-memory array
 *     snapshotSrc: './metrics-data.js',
 *     fallbackPrompt: '…' }         // only set for compute
 *
 * The host handles save/delete by writing the sanitised `funnels` array
 * straight to `src` — no agent turn, throttled at ~4/s trailing-edge. `compute` is the
 * only path that talks to the agent: the host builds the prompt from the
 * typed fields, the agent runs the per-user ordered-first-occurrence query
 * ove
blocks.zh:
如何“获得……”以及
 * 舞台闪烁长达90秒；一旦代理附加
 * 快照文件的新条目、预览重新加载（或
 *“metrics:reload”事件）清除询问状态。
 *
 * 在右侧面板中编辑用户流程（添加/删除步骤、重命名、
 * 重新标记、删除）并点击“获取最新号码”都会发布：
 *
 * { 类型：'指标：漏斗'，
 * 操作：“保存”| '删除' | ‘计算’，
 * src: './funnels.json', // 要写入的文件
 * name: '提示→创建',
 * oldName: '...', // 重命名时出现（“保存”操作）
 * def: { 步骤:[{屏幕,id,ev,标签,inst}], 窗口,
 * splitBy, asOf, hash }, // 组件计算哈希 (djb2)
 * funnels: [...], // 完整的内存数组
 * snapshotSrc: './metrics-data.js',
 *fallbackPrompt: '...' } // 仅为计算设置
 *
 * 主机通过写入清理后的“funnels”数组来处理保存/删除
 * 直接到 `src` — 无代理转弯，后缘节流至 ~4/s。 “计算”是
 * 与代理对话的唯一路径：主机根据
 * 键入字段，代理运行每个用户有序的首次出现查询
 * 过

blocks.original:
r def.steps[].ev, writes result:{defHash:def.hash, asOf, ranAt,
 * rows:[{step,users}], gaps} back into the same entry (echoing def.hash
 * verbatim), then fires 'metrics:reload'. The component re-fetches both
 * the snapshot and funnel-src and clears busy state.
 *
 * ▶ play emits 'metrics:navigate' {screen,id} (bubbling, composed) when
 * a step's element isn't visible.
 * A multi-screen template should listen for this and route to screen:
 *
 *   el.addEventListener('metrics:navigate', e => router.go(e.detail.screen));
 *
 * The component itself just scrolls and rings the element once it's
 * visible; ▶ play steps through def.steps at ~900ms/step, dispatching a
 * real click on each (so the product actually navigates), falling back to
 * navigate for off-screen steps.
 *
 * <metrics-funnel src name> — defined in the same file — is a tiny
 * read-only element that renders one user flow's result.rows as title +
 * bars + a window·asOf caption. Use it to drop a computed flow into a deck
 * or doc without the overlay stage.
 *
 * Imperative API:
 *   el.configure({ scopeOf(el, domScope), primaryScope, subline(q) })
 *     — function-valued adapter opts a JSON attr can't carry. Merge
blocks.zh:
r def.steps[].ev，写入结果：{defHash:def.hash, asOf, ranAt,
 * rows：[{step，users}]，gaps}回到同一条目（回显def.hash
 * 逐字），然后触发“metrics:reload”。该组件重新获取两者
 * 快照和漏斗-src 并清除繁忙状态。
 *
 * ▶ 当播放时，播放会发出 'metrics:navigate' {screen,id} （冒泡，组合）
 * 步骤的元素不可见。
 * 多屏幕模板应该侦听此消息并路由到屏幕：
 *
 * el.addEventListener('metrics:navigate', e => router.go(e.detail.screen));
 *
 * 组件本身只会滚动并在元素出现时使元素响铃
 *可见； ▶ 以 ~900ms/step 的速度通过 def.steps 播放步骤，调度一个
 *真正点击每个（所以产品实际上导航），回退到
 * 导航屏幕外步骤。
 *
 * <metrics-funnel src name> — 在同一文件中定义 — 是一个很小的
 * 将一个用户流的 result.rows 呈现为标题的只读元素 +
 * 条+一个窗口·asOf 标题。使用它将计算流放入甲板中
 * 或没有覆盖阶段的文档。
 *
 * 命令式API：
 * el.configure({scopeOf(el,domScope),primaryScope,subline(q)})
 * — 函数值适配器选择 JSON attr 不能携带。合并

blocks.original:
s over
 *       snapshot.adapterOpts and adapter-opts attr; re-renders.
 *   el.funnels    — the loaded funnels.json array (getter).
 *   el.postFunnel(action, name, def) — same as clicking Get latest numbers in the panel.
 *   el.measure()  — re-measure [data-metric-id] rects now. Call after
 *     opening a popover/menu whose contents carry metric ids (mutations
 *     are observed, but this guarantees a prompt pass).
 *   el.refetch()  — same as clicking "Get latest numbers" in the sentence row.
 *   MetricsOverlay.registerMode(key, spec)
 *   MetricsOverlay.createAdapter(raw, opts)  — exported for hosts that
 *     want to drive the overlay without a src file.
 *
 * Usage — ALWAYS add this component as a tweak, never as an always-on
 * wrapper. In the template's data-props, expose a boolean `metrics`
 * (default false) and an enum `metricsMode` (heat / badges / space); in
 * renderVals map them to the element's attrs —
 *   mode:     props.metrics ? props.metricsMode : 'off'
 *   controls: props.metrics ? 'sentence'       : 'none'
 * — so with the tweak off the overlay is a true passthrough (no chrome,
 * no sentence, no legend) and the template looks unchanged.
 *
 *   <script
blocks.zh:
结束了
 * snapshot.adapterOpts和adapter-opts attr；重新渲染。
 * el.funnels — 加载的 funnels.json 数组（getter）。
 * el.postFunnel(action, name, def) — 与单击面板中的“获取最新数字”相同。
 * el.measure() — 现在重新测量 [data-metric-id] 矩形。之后致电
 * 打开一个弹出窗口/菜单，其内容带有度量 ID（突变
 * 被观察到，但这保证了快速通过）。
 * el.refetch() — 与单击句子行中的“获取最新数字”相同。
 * MetricsOverlay.registerMode(key, 规格)
 * MetricsOverlay.createAdapter(raw, opts) — 为主机导出
 * 想要在没有 src 文件的情况下驱动覆盖层。
 *
 * 用法 — 始终添加此组件作为调整，而不是始终开启
 * 包装纸。在模板的 data-props 中，公开一个布尔值“metrics”
 *（默认 false）和枚举 `metricsMode` （热度/徽章/空间）；在
 * renderVals 将它们映射到元素的 attrs —
 * 模式：props.metrics ? props.metricsMode : '关闭'
 * 控件：props.metrics ? “句子”：“无”
 * - 所以通过调整覆盖层是一个真正的直通（没有镀铬物，
 * 没有句子，没有图例）并且模板看起来没有变化。
 *
 * <脚本

blocks.original:
src="metrics-overlay.js"></script>
 *   <metrics-overlay src="./metrics-data.js" global="HomeMetrics"
 *                    mode="{{mode}}" controls="{{controls}}">
 *     …product UI with data-metric-id attrs…
 *   </metrics-overlay>
 */
/* END USAGE */
blocks.zh:
src="metrics-overlay.js"></script>
 * <metrics-overlay src="./metrics-data.js" global="HomeMetrics"
 * 模式=“{{mode}}”控制=“{{controls}}”>
 * ...带有 data-metric-id 属性的产品 UI...
 * </指标覆盖>
 */
/* 最终用法 */
